summary: Lead accepted M7-PLAYER-GUIDANCE-LITE-001 after independent QA ACCEPT. The implementation adds lightweight localized player guidance with dismiss/collapse, six-step core path, review-aware copy, and focused Storybook/Vitest/Playwright coverage without simulation authority changes.

tests_run.result: Task file valid in REVIEW before lead acceptance.
No whitespace errors across implementation and process diff.
Independent QA reran taskctl validate, validate-handoff, git diff --check, forbidden-path check, pnpm --filter @monsoon/ui test, pnpm test:e2e, and pnpm check with ACCEPT.

decisions.decision: Accept the writer implementation and QA review as satisfying M7-PLAYER-GUIDANCE-LITE-001 acceptance criteria.

Treat writer handoff null head_commit/commit fields as non-blocking because validate-handoff passed, QA pinned reviewed_commit bbbd0fa, and git proves that commit is an ancestor of the accepted branch head.
No Human Gate is active. Manual node battle remains DEFER_MANUAL_NODE_BATTLE.

risks.summary: Default guidance remains review-aware while upstream M7 content review blockers exist.
risks.mitigation: The UI presents a player-facing caution and does not invent culture-specific text or force irreversible choices.

risks.summary: Web and Storybook builds retain existing chunk-size/plugin timing warnings.
risks.mitigation: Commands exit successfully and warnings are not introduced as blockers by this task.

requested_action: Open PR, wait for CI, merge to main, sync main, then mark M7-PLAYER-GUIDANCE-LITE-001 CLOSED after origin/main contains the accepted commits.
